violations.text: The hand washing sink in the second floor staging kitchen was observed not operational. A hand washing sink must be accessible to employees at all times. Establishment to send photo of repair to RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026
The mechanical dish machine located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026
The handle on the chest freezer located in the bakery prep area was not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the first floor bar, and upstairs staging kitchen have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non food contact surfaces must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2026
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

The walls in the second floor staging kitchen are constructed of absorbent material. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2026
The floor bakery prep area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2026
The soda bib system was observed leaking into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2024

The Fridge located in the back prep area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Gaskets located on the 2 Dr Randell and the Pizza prep unit are in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the Dishmachine. The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar. The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the Quat sanitizing solution for the bar 3 bays. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024

The condensate from the chest freezer refrigeration unit was observed frozen in the unit. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. CA - Establishment must run a defrost on the unit. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024

The floor by the pizza prep area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Corrective action - establishment is to repair floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2024
